feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Best Practices for SAP S/4HANA TM to Third Party Integration
entry.content:
We need to integrate SAP S/4HANA TM to 3PL(Third Party) & We are looking for Best Practices or any standard SAP document for Integration via CPI or any other helpful steps.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: SAP Fiori launchpad - save as tile functionality
entry.content:
Greetings,

I am trying to prepare two variants of a report (Manage ** app) and I am having some issues.

I prepare the reports, and I successfully save them as tiles and the tile quick info shows the correct result (6 and 122  - count of returned rows) but when I click on the custom tile the report is defaulted to the general variant.

According to the documentation the functionality should be available: 

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_em92/9.2/en-US/71/a972114577451aa29429183ba9b07f/frameset.htm

So my question is: What must I do that when I click on the custom tile SAP will show the relevant data (the 6 or 122 rows as represented in the quick result of the tile)?

Thank you for you help.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Integration IBP S&OP with ePPDS S/4HANA 2024 - General Questions
entry.content:
Dear Community,

i have question regarding the Integration of both System together for Production planning. 

Do you have any BestPractices for the Horizons of the systems?

Which System is doing the main Planning and in which horizon?

Based on your experience is it better to plan the operational horizon in IBP or in ePPDS? If you have pro and cons it would be very helpful for me.

entry.title: TRD0 in standalone SAP TM - SAP EWM and SAP ECC Integration.
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

Currently in my project every change on article level is updating delivery in ECC. As it`s retail business one delivery is having a lot of articles causing hundreds of updates of delivery. On SAP TM side we only need updates on the whole delivery status like after Good Issue, not necessary when batch is picked. In current configuration TRD0 output is triggered every time delivery is updated in ECC which is stacking our queues in SAP TM - srt_moni. Any idea how to configure TRD0 better to not get that many updates, by standard ?

entry.title: Setting up a Selection &status profile in QM
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

Can anyone guide me how to set up a Selection profile and status profile in QM. My requirement is I don't want to see the cancelled inspection lots when I run QA 32 report. Kindly correct me if is there any way to achieve my requirement. Thank you !!

entry.title: Payment term 001 not defined - Message No. F5839
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm getting above subjected error while posting Item Interest Calculation.

I have uploaded the TCODE FINT Calculation screen in attachment.

There is no payment Term 001 available in DB still why I'm getting this error as payment term 001 not defined. I have configured 0001 standard Payment term which is correctly configured.

Please advise how to resolve this error?

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Finance

entry.title: Fill Port details in E-waybill XML for Export scenario
entry.content:
How to send the Port details in the E-Waybill XML for export scenario?

entry.title: BP - CVI - Records Not Marked For Deletion Field " MISSING "
entry.content:
Friends, 

Topic: - Simplified Handling of Records Marked For Deletion - Enhancements To MDS Load Cockpit.

Records Not Marked For Deletion Field is " MISSING " - Marked in Yellow in attached screen shot. 

Please advice 

Thanks

entry.title: Not able to Fetch Purchase Info Record Automatically in STO PO for India Localization
entry.content:
Hello SAP Gurus,

I am facing an issue in STO Indian scenario, where in i have maintained the Purchase info Record against the Supplying Plant (Vendor) with the tax code but while creating the STO PO, the system which is supposed to Fetch the Purchase Info Record automatically, is not fetching it and i have to enter Purchase info record number manually every time i create a STO to trigger tax amount from the tax code maintained in PIR, unlike in THE Standard PO where the system fetches it automatically.

Kindly suggest if there is any standard solution for this issue.

#STOIndia #PurchaseInfoRecord 

Thank you in advance

entry.title: Report(s) that show After the Fact (ATF) Purchase Orders
entry.content: I am looking for some guidance on how to run a report or set of reports that will show After-The-Fact (ATF) purchase orders. Specifically, I want to identify purchase orders that were created after the invoice was received. My initial thought was to compare Invoice date to purchase order date, as if the invoice date is before the PO date this would indicate an after the fact PO. However, it appears there is no way to easily connect or run a report that shows invoices with invoice date AND the corresponding PO number. Any help or guidance would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: can only create a project on Dev environment
entry.content:
I've assigned the same role in all the environment and I can only create a project on Dev environment. 

Is it normal? 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: S/4Hana Courses for beginer
entry.content:
I am working in Org where ECC/EC is implemented & soon they will be migrating to S/4 Hana. I can see many when i search but actually do not know where to start with. Can anyone suggest me the beginner courses for myself to get equipped with what is S/4 Hana and how i can educate myself morfe about what is it and its benefits

thx

entry.title: Missing Material master values for S/4 PPDS
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

Im customizing a PPDS S/4 System but for some standard fields there is not value behind. 

Like the strategy parameter in the advanced planning tab in material master is not maintained.

Does anyone have a idea how to solve that? It looks like something went wrong during the setup of the system.

Kind regards,

Max

entry.title: MIRO BADI for line item update
entry.content:
Dear SAP,

We would like to use a custom enhancement to update the line item at a time of posting an invoice (MIRO). 

For example, when we give the PO and other details in MIRO and hit enter, we would like the GL account to be updated in the GL account tab.

Regards,
Mazeen.

entry.title: Depreciation Posting AFAB S4HANA BADIS FAA_DC_CUSTOMER, FAA_EE_CUSTOME not work
entry.content:
Best regards.

We come to you because we have a situation in the implementation of Badis FAA_DC_CUSTOMER and FAA_EE_CUSTOMER for the S4HANA environment.

The Badis mentioned above have been implemented in the ECC environment and have traditionally been running on transactions: ABNAN, ABAON, ABAVN, ABZU, ABMA, ABAA, ABAW, ABZON, AS02, AS01, ABUMN, AB08, AFAR and AFAB.

Currently, logic to customize the ECC processes has been implemented in the above mentioned badis and transactions:

  • DC_CLOSED_YEARS_CALC
  • DC_RETIREMENT_REQUEST
  • DC_TRANSACTION_POSTING
  • DC_RECALCULATION
  • DC_TRANSACTION_CALCULATE
  • DC_DEPRECIATION_POSTING

Specifically the finding we have is under the transaction AFAB due to the fact that in the S4HANA environment the mentioned badis (FAA_DC_CUSTOMER, FAA_EE_CUSTOMER) are not executed.

In the ECC environment, for transaction AFAB we identified that the Badis are executed for the process “DC_DEPRECATION_POSTING” and the sub-process “DC_DEPRECATION_POSTING”.

We identified the interface IF_FAA_DC_SEGMENTS_720_C which uses the FI-AA component to declare the value of the processes and steps that are used in S4HANA, however it was not possible to identify which of these would replace or be the equivalent of the ECC process and subprocess “DC_DEPRECATION_POSTING”Fixed assets

entry.title: CJEN deletes value type 11 (statistical actual) in RPSCO table
entry.content:
I made postings via tcode KAFD as part of our migration on August 2024.  Recently,  I have implemented SAP note 853530 - Residual order plan should not be taken into account to address issue on RemOrdPlan.  One of the instructions after the sap note is implemented is to run CJEN where check box "delete" was unticked and CJBV.  After i run CJEN, I noticed that all my postings made via KAFD with value type 11 were deleted and this resulted to incorrect Actual Cost in CN41N.

 

How can I restore those postings in RPSCO given that when I ran CJEN,  delete checkbox was not ticked.  How come it deletes value type 11?

entry.title: Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX
entry.content:
Hi Experts

We are trying to trigger the SOAP API CO_EDI_ORDER_CONF_REQUEST for Sales Order Confirmation as an EDI output, this is an outbound scenario to send Sales order confirmation from SAP S/4HANA (Private Cloud) to SAP Integration Suite which will further map the message and send to 3rd party system.

but encountering an issue where the service is not being called, we are getting this error in the output processing,

Error getting technical receiver for outbound service EDI_ORDERCONFIRMATIONREQUEST_OUT_SPRX

  • The Logical port has been created in SOAMANAGER
  • NACE configuration has been done to configure the respective program and form routine as per SAP documentation. https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/19d48293097f4a2589433856b034dfa5/cf829dd7c1ef4eb08eca4575c2e518ff.html

In Debugging via program RSNAST00:

The code is trying to determine provider applications (technical receiver) in the below code, which fails and this error is thrown, any idea how and where to maintain the provider application/technical receiver?

Any documentation link will be helpful.

 

Thanks

Deepak

entry.title: PDM Newsletter RISE with SAP - October 2024
entry.content:
Welcome to the PDM Newsletter RISE with SAP Blog!

We're excited to introduce you to our monthly newsletter, your go-to resource for staying connected with the latest innovations, insights, and trends in the RISE with SAP ecosystem. Each edition is thoughtfully curated to provide exclusive expert guidance, inspiring stories, and actionable content designed to help you enhance your skills and stay ahead in the ever-evolving world of SAP.

Whether you're looking to explore emerging technologies or gain valuable knowledge tailored to your needs, our newsletter has you covered. We also encourage you to share this resource with your network and become an active member of our vibrant partner community.

Thank you for your continued support! Should you have any feedback or questions, don’t hesitate to reach out. We’re here to help you make the most of your RISE with SAP journey.

Stay tuned, stay informed, and sign up today! 

Let's grow together!

 

Victor Echeverri Reyes                                                               

 SAP S/4HANA Cloud Partner Delivery Manager                                                                                   Ecosystem Delivery Success   
 E: victor.echeverri.reyes@sap.com

entry.title: Local consumption of business event in S/4HANA ABAP cloud
entry.content:
Could you please explain the below with Example. In My case I am using R_SalesOrderTP . But while implementing in through eclipse it is saying The use of Behavior Definition R_SALESORDERTP is not permitted. I came accrose one more question that as it is i am pasting here. 


"I came across the SAP documentation regarding local consumption of standard business events

https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-rap/business-event-consumption?version=s4hana_cloud

And it was highlighted that the event to be consumed needs to be exposed in a C1 released RAP BO interface.

Now I am wondering, are all these events from the accelerator hub for s/4hana cloud based on RAP BO model? And if not, where/how could some of these events were defined/raised?

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPS4HANACloudBusinessEvents/event

Also, is there a way for us to find the behavior definition where the event was defined? Or for that we will need to have access to a live S/4HANA cloud system?"

entry.title: Overlapping fields in the pop-up associated with the occasional customer when creating a sales order
entry.content:
Hi

I'm having a problem with the occasional customer, i.e. when I put the sold-to party “sporadic” in the sales order, when I open the pop-up to change the data associated with the customer at the time of the sale, overlapping fields appear, in particular the field relating to the tax number.

 

As you can see in the image, the other attributes tab and its fields appear overlapping, making it impossible to fill in those fields.

I don't know if this error has to do with the system version, as it's S/4HANA, version 102.

Has anyone had this problem?

Thanks
